use_cases: Landing page hero sections with immersive parallax scrolling effects
Nature or outdoor-themed websites requiring dynamic background movement
Storytelling pages where depth and movement enhance user engagement
ai_summary: A parallax hero component featuring wilderness-themed visuals with scroll-triggered depth effects. The component creates an immersive landing experience with layered background elements that move at different speeds during scrolling. Designed for websites requiring dramatic visual storytelling with outdoor or nature aesthetics.
